'''Kroctar''' was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Kroctari]], and the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] and [[Merchant/Legends|merchant]] center of the [[Shataum sector/Legends|Shataum sector]].

In [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]], during the [[Caamas Document Crisis]], the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] was a member of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] but was willing to join the [[Imperial Remnant]] upon the [[Flim (Human)|faked]] resurrection of [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]]. In order to discuss their readmission into the Remnant, [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Dorja]] ferried the [[Sinister Triumvirate]] aboard the [[Relentless (Dorja)|''Relentless'']] to the Kroctari homeworld where they met their leader, [[Lord Superior]] [[Bosmihi]].

Kroctar later fell to the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].

{{Planet-stub}}
